item.title: ASML Moves Beyond EUV As AI Chip Arms Race Heats Up
item.description: ASML is expanding into advanced packaging for AI chips, aiming to enhance performance and speed. Stock up 103% over the past year. Importance Rank: 1 ...

item.title: Ford, GM, Stellantis Slip Amid Oil Price Surge As US-Iran War Escalates
item.description: Automakers Ford, GM and Stellantis see stock decline as U.S.-Iran war escalates and oil prices surge globally. Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Says AI Could Lead To Four-Day Work Week: 'It Will Be A Wonderful Thing'
item.description: Jamie Dimon said AI could eventually shorten the workweek to four days while boosting productivity and innovation. Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Cocoa's Epic 70% Plunge Should Mean Cheaper Chocolate — So Why Are Americans Still Getting Hit At Checkout?
item.description: Cocoa futures have fallen 63% in the past year. But with manufacturers locked into hedges at peak prices and West African tariffs intact, experts say ...

item.title: DeFi Liquidity Holds Steady Despite Price Shock, Offering a Real Stress Test
item.description: While crypto prices moved sharply lower, the underlying machinery of decentralized finance kept running. Importance Rank: 1 read more
